query: SELECT authorName FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName IN (SELECT DISTINCT ap2.authorName FROM author_profiles ap1 JOIN author_profiles ap2 ON ap1.id != ap2.id AND (ap1.authorName LIKE CONCAT(ap2.authorName, '%') OR ap2.authorName LIKE CONCAT(ap1.authorName, '%')) WHERE LENGTH(ap1.authorName) != LENGTH(ap2.authorName)) ORDER BY authorName LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT authorName FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName IN (SELECT DISTINCT ap2.authorName FROM author_profiles ap1 JOIN author_profiles ap2 ON ap1.id != ap2.id AND (ap1.authorName LIKE CONCAT(ap2.authorName, '%') OR ap2.authorName LIKE CONCAT(ap1.authorName, '%')) WHERE LENGTH(ap1.authorName) != LENGTH(ap2.authorName)) ORDER BY authorName LIMIT 20
